title: seseli montanum subsp. coloratum
intro: Seseli montanum subsp. coloratum, also known as Alpine Finel, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the carrot family, Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which can help relieve respiratory issues and reduce pain and swelling. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs, and treating digestive issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Seseli montanum subsp. coloratum can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
